summary: This week, Anthropic updated its Responsible Scaling Policy, offering deeper insights into the safety and ethical considerations guiding Claude's development.

items.title: Responsible Scaling Policy Update
items.summary: Anthropic announced an update to their Responsible Scaling Policy, outlining their approach to safely developing increasingly capable AI systems. This update provides builders with insight into the safety guardrails and ethical considerations guiding Claude's development, ensuring a more trustworthy and reliable platform.
